priorities.name: Rohini
priorities.reason: AQI 56 (Satisfactory) with 57% construction attribution confidence. ~92,000 residents exposed. Dispatch municipal squads to enforce dust control norms (water sprinkling, covers) at active construction sites. High PM10 suggests fugitive dust.
